evidence.description: Full unit test suite at the signed head. Allowlisted in .agent-receipts/policy.yml; the gate executes it without a shell in a contained verification worktree.
The delivered README.md, content-addressed at the signed head.

evidence.claim: Docs-only change, rendered and proofread locally. This PR is one half of the public receipts-gate demonstration (docs/DEMO.md); its twin carries no receipt and fails the same check.

judgment_calls: This PR is a public demonstration. The receipt is real: same key, same flow, same gate as any working PR to this repo.

request.preview: Add a 'verify a receipt without trusting the author' section to README.md; docs-only, clearly-labeled demo PR with a v0.2 receipt (sign-then-attach).
request.source: tasks/pr-5.md, committed to the base branch by the issuer (PR #6)
